fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. ticket next, root-scoped next, unblocked-by, and board recommendations incorporate became_actionable_at after stronger convergence pressure. 2. The new ranking signal never outranks stronger dependency-convergence pressure or blocker-state urgency. 3. Agent-facing machine-readable surfaces expose the timing and tree-ordering metadata used by the comparator. 4. Focused validation proves recently actionable work rises ahead of equivalent older work while urgent blocker repair still wins.
